items.title: On Independence Day, Israel Honors Rabbi Who Called to ‘Flatten’ Gaza
items.description: Avraham Zarbiv became known on Israel’s right for demolishing buildings in Gaza. He lit a torch at a national ceremony on Tuesday evening.

items.title: Pope Leo, Visiting African Prison, Urges Inmates to Find Hope Amid Despair
items.description: “Life is not defined solely by one’s mistakes,” the pope told inmates being held in a port city of Equatorial Guinea.
